titlestmt.titleproper: Farmers Union of the New York Milk Shed records1858
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Katherine Jacklin

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:09:02 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM01858Farmers Union of the New York Milk Shed records1858Compiled by Katherine JacklinDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
July 18, 20032B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
agric laborThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:13:44 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Farmers Union of the New York Milk Shed records
Farmers\' Union of the New York Milk Shed
1858
7.1 cubic feet. 7.1 cubic feet.
1939-1957. Correspondence, mimeographs, scrapbooks, newspapers, book, broadside. Correspondence of Archie Wright, president, and Alfred C. Kuchler, secretary-treasurer of the Farmers' Union of the New York Milk Shed; copies of speeches and articles; mimeographed letters and bulletins; reports, minutes, broadsides, scrapbooks for 1940-55, and miscellaneous papers. Correspondents include persons prominent in New York agriculture and politics. Other materials are papers of or about County organizations of the Farmers' Union, annual conventions, the Dairy Farmers' Union, and various organizations, agencies, and publications dealing with dairy farming in the state. Collection material in English 2079233
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Katherine Jacklin
Date completed:
June 21, 1966
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, July 2003
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence of Archie Wright, president, and Alfred C. Kuchler, secretary-treasurer of the Farmers' Union of the New York Milk Shed; copies of speeches and articles; mimeographed letters and bulletins; reports, minutes, broadsides, scrapbooks for 1940-55, and miscellaneous papers. Correspondents include persons prominent in New York agriculture and politics. Other materials are papers of or about County organizations of the Farmers' Union, annual conventions, the Dairy Farmers' Union, and various organizations, agencies, and publications dealing with dairy farming in the state.
Cite As:
Farmers' Union of the New York Milk Shed records, #1858. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Speeches. Scrapbooks. Broadsides. Milk trade -- New York (State) Dairying. Agriculture -- New York (State) Kuchler, Alfred C. Wright, Archie. Dairy Farmers\' Union
